name: The creature named Jack/Derlik
description:
(The art is made by Darkness-Nova, posted by Le_Jack on FA)

I know there's already two bots about him (maybe more, idk), but I haven't see anyone do him in his "feral" form.

Scenario is greatly inspired by Trepang2 (I copied most of the lore), as I love that game way too much. You're supposed to be a simple grunt (or a scientist) in this one.

You're not expected to survive.

After making this bot... I still think that I forgot to include something... Please tell me if there's any issues.

Update: Added a new intro message since you guys wanted one one. It's not good, but the best one I could think of.
creator: Aw yup
